name: Chocolate Freezer Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs.
2. Beat the yolks lightly with a fork.
3. Melt the chocolate and margarine together.
4. Add the yolks to the melted mixture.
5. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the chocolate mixture.
7. Divide the batter in half and pour one half into a greased 26cm spring form pan (or cake tin).
8. Bake for approximately 15 minutes, or until dry on top.
9. Cool for a few minutes before pouring over the remaining batter.
10. Freeze immediately. If stored in the deep freeze, remove at least 30 minutes before serving.
